title: Home
description: Central dashboard showing today's snapshot — pregnancy progress, quick-log buttons, and personalized wellness nudges

title: Browse
description: Discovery hub containing cycle tracking and weight management entry points

title: Library
description: Personal bookshelf containing health log, mood wellness, and education resources

title: Profile
description: Personal profile with mindfulness access, settings, and user preferences

title: Cycle Tracking
description: Log menstrual cycles, view ovulation predictions, and manage cycle-related reminders

title: Weight & Nutrition
description: Log daily weight, view progress chart, and read stage-specific nutrition tips

title: My Pregnancy
description: Due date management, week-by-week body change descriptions, and fetal development visuals

title: Mindfulness
description: Guided breathing exercises, light stretching guides, and mindful activity suggestions

title: Health Log
description: Unified timeline of all health entries — symptoms, doctor visits, reminders

title: Mood & Wellness
description: Log daily moods and energy levels, visualize patterns over time, receive gentle wellness nudges

title: Education
description: Browse and read trusted educational articles organized by topic

title: Article Reader
description: Read a single article with clean typography, bookmark capability, and related articles

title: Settings
description: Manage user profile, due date, notification preferences, and data export

title: Breathing Exercise
description: Full-screen animated breathing exercise with visual guidance

title: Stretching Guide
description: Bottom sheet with step-by-step stretching instructions and trimester suitability

title: Mode Selector
description: Bottom sheet for selecting display modes or tracking preferences on Home

title: Symptom Detail
description: Bottom sheet for viewing or editing symptom log entries
